meta.title: STE. MOUAWAD | Enterprise Artistique
meta.description: Luxury marble craftsmanship, sacred interiors, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, and bespoke stone execution in Lebanon since 1967.

hero.title: Crafting Sacred Spaces Since 1967
hero.subtitle: From design to execution, transforming natural stone into timeless works of art.

heritage.title: A Family Legacy in Stone
heritage.body1: Since 1967, STE. MOUAWAD has specialized in churches, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, and custom marble creations throughout Lebanon and beyond.
heritage.body2: Every project combines artistic vision, technical expertise, and generations of craftsmanship.

instagram.title: Follow Our Latest Work
instagram.text: Discover our recent projects, craftsmanship and behind-the-scenes moments.
instagram.caption: Follow on Instagram

cta.title: Let's Create Something Timeless
cta.text: Whether you're restoring a church, designing a custom fireplace, or bringing a unique artistic vision to life, we're ready to help.
